# Canonical exFAT fixture produced by macOS newfs_exfat.
#
# Generation (see compat_test.go: regenerateMkfsImage):
#
#   newfs_exfat -v EXFATTEST <attached raw 512 KiB image>
#   mkdir -p /sub
#   printf 'hello\n' > /hello.txt
#   dd if=/dev/zero bs=1024 count=1 | tr '\0' 'A' > /sub/blob.bin
#   # AppleDouble side-cars and .fseventsd are stripped before commit.
#
# Format:
#   <md5sum>  <size_bytes>  <path>
#
# Image (decompressed): 524288 bytes total. The image-level md5 below is the
# committed snapshot; regenerated fixtures pin all four file-level hashes
# below but may differ at the image level due to newfs_exfat randomising the
# volume serial number each invocation.
fd5a09147611b6ad05d885c5a94b11f6  524288  image.exfat  (committed snapshot)
#
# Files inside the image:
b1946ac92492d2347c6235b4d2611184       6  /hello.txt
d47b127bc2de2d687ddc82dac354c415    1024  /sub/blob.bin
#
# Volume label: EXFATTEST
